/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o -o ../../bin/main  -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert.cpp/ggml/src/ggml-metal ../libbert.dylib ../ggml/src/libggml.0.11.1.dylib ../ggml/src/libggml-cpu.0.11.1.dylib ../ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.11.1.dylib ../ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.11.1.dylib ../ggml/src/libggml-base.0.11.1.dylib
